basics.name: Álvaro Sebastián G.
basics.label: Software/Backend Developer - University Technician in Computer Science
basics.summary: I'm a software developer with a passion for backend development. I have experience in building RESTful APIs with Python, Node.js, and PHP. I'm also experienced in database modeling and management with PostgreSQL, MySQL, and MongoDB. I'm always eager to learn new technologies and improve my skills.

work.name: Mercadolibre/Mercadopago Chile
work.summary: Mercadolibre is the largest e-commerce platform in Latin America, and its payment system, Mercadopago, is the most used in the region.
highlights: Database Modeling and Management with PostgreSQL

work.name: i-Car S.A.
work.summary: ICAR not only improves the process of First Vehicle Registration by doing it electronically, but also all the processes and procedures necessary for a new and used vehicle to circulate in Chile.
highlights: REST API Development with Node.js & Express

work.name: Jumpitt Labs SpA
work.summary: Jumpitt is always at the forefront of technology and is a leader in solutions that require custom software development. It understands the challenges companies face when looking for innovative, high-performance development solutions.
highlights: REST API Development with Node.js, Koa & Fastify
JWT Authentication, OAuth w/ Google, Apple Login, and others
Database Modeling and Management with PostgreSQL & MongoDB

work.name: Prosys Ingenieria SPA
work.summary: Prosys is a software factory with 16 years of experience in IT and presence in Santiago and Viña del Mar. It adapts to the diverse technologies that it has seen in its trajectory
highlights: Progressive Web App in Ionic4 & Angular

volunteer.summary: Teletón is a solidarity campaign that seeks to improve the quality of life of children and young people with disabilities.

publications.name: Video compression for 3d media
publications.summary: Innovative middle-out compression algorithm that changes the way we store data.

publications.name: Audio compression for Virtual Reality
publications.summary: Revolutionary compression technology that enhances the audio experience in virtual reality.

languages.summary: Proficient in English with a pretty good level of speaking, writing and comprehension abilities. Able to effectively communicate ideas and understand complex information in both personal and professional settings. Demonstrates strong grammar skills and a broad vocabulary.

references.name: Erlich Bachman
references.reference: It is my pleasure to recommend Richard, his performance working as a consultant for Main St. Company proved that he will be a valuable addition to any company.

references.name: Laurie Bream
references.reference: It is my pleasure to recommend Monica, her exceptional skills and talent were evident during her time at High-Tech Inc. I am confident that she will make a valuable impact at any organization she joins.
